svg.text: Answers can reach 100% before the system remembers why — the mirage shelf
system must always give an answer

g.text: In forced decoding, causal_referee hits answer = 1.0 at just 2 bits, but witness fidelity drops to 0.641 — the system "knows" the answer but has lost track of why.
With abstention, this mirage vanishes entirely.

svg.text: Figure 2 · Stark: Selective Memory Theory · Exact Pareto Frontier Envelopes
